case_number: Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No. S – 52 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.3949/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.10.2024 None has appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation is received. On 29.08.2024 the following order was passed;- “Learned counsel for the applicant requires time in order to file further documents by way of statement specially the earlier proceedings and order passed therein. As soon as the statement is filed the matter be fixed before the Court.” Thereafter the aforesaid order has not been complied with nor today the counsel for the applicant has appeared to proceed with the matter. The instant Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
